description:
#drmylesmunroe

watch the full video here: 👇👇👇👇👇
https://youtu.be/nXiCJKjXNl4

Join Our WhatsApp Group: https://chat.whatsapp.com/G8LRXLA3RSdFACRUzNkWgp
Welcome to Munroe Recaps 

• Additional Information 
Myles Munroe, OBE (20 April 1954 – 9 November 2014) was a Bahamian teacher and ordained minister, professor, author, speaker and leadership consultant. He founded and led the Bahamas Faith Ministries International (BFMI), and Myles Munroe International (MMI). He was also the chief executive officer and chairman of the board of the International Third World Leaders Association, and president of the International Leadership Training Institute. Dr Munroe was a prolific author as well.

Munroe and his wife died in a plane crash on November 9, 2014. Bahamian officials stated their aircraft struck a crane at a ship yard near Grand Bahama International Airport. Munroe and the other passengers were heading to Grand Bahama for a conference.

If you are inspired by Dr. Myles Munroe message and want to learn more about recognizing and supporting God's chosen vessels, please subscribe to this YouTube channel and share this video with your friends and family. Together, let us rise up as a generation of spiritual leaders, empowering others to fulfill their divine destiny and advance the kingdom of God on earth. 

• Keywords: #SuccessTeaching
#PurposeDrivenLife
#LeadershipDevelopment
#PersonalGrowth
#SuccessMindset
#FaithAndSuccess
#Inspiration
#KingdomPrinciples
#MotivationalTeaching
#WisdomForLife

Don't forget to like, share, and subscribe for more inspiring content! 
Subscribe to  @unroeRecapsM    for more life-transforming content! 🔔

► Music licensed through Artlist.io 

► Footage licensed through Filmpac.com and Story Blocks 

► Speaker: Dr. Myles Munroe
Subscribe to his channel here  ‎ ⁨@MunroeGlobal⁩      

All scripture animations are derived from the King James Bible (KJV) or simply the Authorized Version (AV) 

Our purpose, when making these videos, is to make quality educational motivational videos and share these with our viewers. 

----------------------------------------------------------

we have significantly transformed the content in our video; the video is protected by fair use, fair dealing, or similar exceptions to copyright

The music and visuals that grace our videos are meticulously chosen and used with the utmost respect for copyright.  We acknowledge Footage Firm, Inc. (owners of storyblocks.com, videoblocks.com, graphicstock.com, and audioblocks.com) for granting us the right to incorporate their work into our creations. 

---------------------------------------------------------- 

Let us embark on this journey together.  Connect with us to stay connected and continue to cultivate the divine spark within. 

Email: mysticempire544@gmail.com

=====
Our Commitment to Quality: 
We are dedicated to producing original and innovative content that stands out.  Each video is meticulously crafted to extract the essence of the message and present it in a way that resonates deeply.  Creative effects are employed judiciously to illuminate key points, while our conversational approach, featuring multiple speakers who seamlessly complete each other's thoughts, fosters a sense of engagement.  Intermittent sampling further enriches the experience.
